value.found_quote: Context compaction: Automatic context compaction (triggered at ~135k tokens) to support long-running, multi-turn sessions without losing context or hitting token limits.
value.rationale: The page explicitly lists "Context compaction" as a capability of the Antigravity agent, describing it as automatic compaction triggered at ~135k tokens to support long-running, multi-turn sessions. However, the page only mentions *automatic* context compaction — it does not mention a *manual* option. The claim states "manual + auto," but the page only substantiates the automatic variant. The agent itself is in preview status ("Antigravity agent is available in preview through the Interactions API").
